hero.title: One subscription. Unlimited apps.
hero.description: Start free with focused access, then choose a simple Individual plan when you are ready for the full Ansiversa ecosystem.

plans.name: Free
plans.description: Explore Ansiversa with limited access to selected Apps and platform features.
features: Access to a focused set of starter Apps.
Basic usage limits and standard support.
Upgrade later without losing your progress.

plans.name: Individual - Monthly
plans.description: Full access with the flexibility of a simple month-to-month plan.
features: Full access to current individual Apps.
New individual Apps included while subscribed.
Priority access to newly launched experiences.

plans.name: Individual - Yearly
plans.description: Enjoy the full individual ecosystem for a year at the best value.
features: Everything included in the Monthly plan.
A lower effective cost for committed users.
One simple renewal for the full year.

included.title: One account for everything
included.description: Paid individual plans are designed to provide one consistent experience across the current and future Ansiversa mini Apps.
features: Unified access across the Ansiversa ecosystem.
New individual Apps added to the platform over time.
A calm, focused experience built from shared standards.

comparison.title: Choose the plan that matches your rhythm
comparison.description: Start free, then move to a simple paid plan when you need broader access.

rows.bestFor: Exploring Ansiversa and trying selected Apps.
rows.apps: A limited set of starter mini Apps.
Full access to current individual Apps.
rows.support: Priority support as the platform grows.

rows.bestFor: Teams that want a shared focused workspace.
rows.apps: Individual Apps plus future collaboration features.
rows.support: Team onboarding and dedicated support in the future.
